Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold success fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light success tints (one step darker).

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold warning fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light warning tints (one step darker).

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold danger fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light danger tints (one step darker).

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold info fills — follows the hover law.

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light info tints (one step darker).

On-Primary.$description: White — violet/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.
magenta/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.
coral/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

Primary.$description: Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body.

On-Primary.$description: green/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.
orange/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.
White — blue/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900.

Primary.$description: Disabled text — WCAG exempts inactive components from contrast minimums.
Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body.

On-Primary.$description: yellow/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white.

Strong.$description: Functional border for form controls — meets non-text contrast 3:1 on white. Use for inputs; default stays decorative (dividers, cards).

Default.$description: Decorative brand border (= main /500), deliberately exempt from 3:1 — pair with a fill/tint.
Decorative brand border (= main /500), deliberately exempt from 3:1 — pair with a fill/tint.

Swatch.$description: Hairline for colour swatches/thumbnails so light fills keep an edge.

Border.$description: Default hairline for inputs, cards, dividers (1px).

Ring.$description: Width of the focus ring itself (CSS outline-width).

Offset.$description: GAP between element edge and focus ring (CSS outline-offset) — spacing, not a stroke. Not applicable inside Figma.
